records.unit: outbound direct destination airports, CHQ NS26 summer schedule period ending 2026-10-24
records.sourceName: Chania Airport / Fraport Greece destinations timetable
records.sourceExcerpt: CHQ official destinations page exposes destination airports through /en/selected_country and outbound timetable rows through /en/destinations. Live recount on 2026-06-30 returned 116 listed destination airports and 115 outbound airports with timetable rows; IST had no outbound rows. The page states flight details relate to the period until 24/10/2026, and the HSCA calendar marks NW26/27 as starting 25-Oct-2026.
records.notes: Rethymno uses CHQ because its nearest_airport row selects Chania International Airport (CHQ/LGSA) by straight-line distance, while the airport_drive_minutes row separately records HER as the faster OSRM drive proxy. Do not inherit this row to Heraklion, Agios Nikolaos, or the Crete parent without their own selected-airport basis.
